//: gosec config + allowlist. Add exclusions ONLY with a justification comment in the entry. New entries require a code review nod from a second human; rotation review when the suppressed code changes.

global.//: Audit mode false because empty audit output looks identical to clean run; we want explicit pass.

rules.//: Per-rule overrides go here. Format: "Gxxx": {"enabled": false, "reason": "..."}
